# Workbench

> [!abstract] Purpose
> Central hub for Claude Code assistant output, project documentation drafts, and working notes before they move into project workspaces.

## Quick Navigation

| Area | Description |
|:-----|:------------|
| [[Inbox]] | Unsorted notes and quick captures |
| [[Claude Sessions]] | Outputs and logs from Claude Code |
| [[Projects Index]] | Draft documentation for projects |

## Folder Map

```
workbench/
  inbox/           Unsorted captures and daily notes
  claude-sessions/ Claude Code outputs and conversations
  projects/        Draft project documentation
  templates/       Note templates
  attachments/     Images, PDFs, and other files
```
